COMPLAINT FILED:12/2/93 3:20PM #7 JDG JEROME STEVENSON. CSR SANDRA NAYLOR. CLERK M SANCHEZ. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ARNOLD EVJE III COUNSEL FOR PLTF PRESENT. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. NEGO- TIATED DISPO READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR POSSESION AND RESTITUTION. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEENS, JESSIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 265 FELL ST, #210 S.F., STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS IF DEFT VACATES BY 1/15/94. IF DEFT DOES NOT PLTF WILL HAVE A JDGMENT FOR RENT/DAMAGES OF $1,109.12 & ATTORNEY FEES OF $350. DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AT PREMISES AFTER 1/15/94 IS DEEMED TO BE AGONDONED AND MAY BE DISPOSED.
